description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is primarily finished in white and light gray, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The front entrance is sheltered by a small overhang, and there is a visible porch area with steps leading up to the door. The property is surrounded by several trees and shrubs, providing a landscaped urban setting. The structure features a mix of solid wall sections and open glass areas, suggesting a bright and airy interior. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, two-story white and gray bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and several trees in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and a green lawn area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more windows, the back lawn, and additional trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible porch steps, side windows, and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
